export { rootRoute, index, route, layout, physical } from './api' export type { LayoutRoute, Route, IndexRoute, PhysicalSubtree, VirtualRootRoute, VirtualRouteNode, } from './types' export { defineVirtualSubtreeConfig } from './defineConfig' export type { ConfigExport, ConfigFn, ConfigFnObject, ConfigFnPromise, VirtualRouteSubtreeConfig, } from './defineConfig'
